content:
🚀 netscanner | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Network scanning and diagnostics from the terminal with a modern TUI.
✨ Key Features: • List HW Interfaces • Switching active Interface • WiFi networks scanning • WiFi signals strength (with charts) • IPv4 Pinging CIDR
📖 Summary: Netscanner is a Rust-based terminal network scanner and diagnostic tool that provides a modern TUI for analyzing network interfaces, scanning WiFi networks, and performing packet dumping and port scanning. It allows users to switch active interfaces, monitor WiFi signal strength, ping IPv4 CIDRs, and filter packet logs.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
